controls.title: Access Review and Privileged Role Validation
controls.description: Periodic review of privileged access, role membership, and exceptions for sensitive systems.

controls.title: Data Loss Prevention and Sensitive Data Scanning
controls.description: Detect and prevent exposure of sensitive data in logs, reports, exports, and downstream systems.

controls.title: Change Management and Production Approval
controls.description: Changes to production workflows must follow approval, testing, and rollback requirements.
